faqData:[{id:1,question:'How do I request a ride?',answer:'Open the Falcon Ride app, enter your destination in the pickup location, confirm the pickup location, and request a ride. You\'ll see real-time driver information and estimated arrival time.'},{id:2,question:'How are fares calculated?',answer:'Fares are calculated based on distance, time, and current demand. You\'ll always see the estimated fare before confirming your ride. There are no hidden charges.'},{id:3,question:'Are Falcon Ride drivers insured?',answer:'Yes, all Falcon Ride drivers are fully insured including commercial insurance which provides additional coverage for passengers.
